framework_principles.source: LTAD, FMS, IJF Judo in Schools, US Youth Soccer, ITF, USA Volleyball
core: Teach ABCs of athleticism first: Agility, Balance, Coordination, Speed.
Gross motor before fine motor. Head-to-toe progression. Simple to complex.
Variable practice beats blocked practice — mix skills within a lesson for better long-term retention.
It takes ~8 weeks of repetition for a movement to become muscle memory. Do not rush progressions.
Intensity rhythm per lesson: low → medium → high → medium → high → low.
If focus drops, intercept with a 2-5 min tag or relay game, then return.
Three FMS categories must rotate monthly: Locomotor · Object control · Stability.

tumbling_readiness_criteria.forward_roll: Can squat, place hands flat, tuck chin. Rolls without falling sideways. Stands at end.
tumbling_readiness_criteria.backward_roll: Forward roll is consistent (chin stays tucked, no sideways deviation). Can bear weight on hands.
tumbling_readiness_criteria.cartwheel: Can do a confident hurdle step. Handstand shape understood (straight body, arms by ears).
tumbling_readiness_criteria.handstand: Cartwheel is controlled. Strong enough to briefly hold weight on straight arms.
tumbling_readiness_criteria.bridge: Flexible enough to place hands flat beside head from lying down. Comfortable with back extension.
tumbling_readiness_criteria.round_off: Cartwheel is consistent. Understands the snap-down and push from the floor.

framework_principles.tumbling_sessions_per_skill: 2–3 lessons minimum per skill before introducing the next. Faster learners get progressions within the same skill (e.g. run-up, two-in-a-row, skill combo).

common_errors: Rolling over the top of the head (headstand roll) → chin not tucked. Slow down, press chin to chest before rolling.
Rolling sideways → chin still not tucked. Use the key cue.
Cannot stand without hands → momentum lost. Coach to tuck chin all the way through and pop hips forward.

backward_roll.key_cue: Push the floor away — hands save your neck.
common_errors: Rolling onto the neck (dangerous) → hands not placed early enough or not pushing.
Cannot get over → lacks hip flexibility or momentum. Start with rock-and-roll on spine first.

cartwheel.key_cue: One hand, other hand, one foot, other foot — like a clock.
common_errors: Both hands landing at same time → rushing. Slow down, place one hand then the other.
Bent arms → upper body not strong enough yet. Build handstand holds first.

handstand.key_cue: Squeeze your ears with your arms. Body like a straight plank.
common_errors: Banana back (arching) → core not engaged. Do hollow body holds first.
Kicking too hard → loses control. Kick gently, find balance.

Soccer.lesson_1: Dribbling — inside foot, little taps, keep ball close. Cue: tap don't boot.
Soccer.lesson_2: Passing — plant foot next to ball, kick through center. Cue: toes point at target.
Soccer.lesson_3: Shooting + small-sided game. Cue: aim low, follow through.

Basketball.lesson_1: Bounce and catch — two hands, watch the ball. Then dribbling with dominant hand.
Basketball.lesson_2: Dribbling alternating hands + bounce pass. Cue: push down, not slap.
Basketball.lesson_3: Chest pass + shooting (BEEF: Balance, Eyes, Elbow, Follow-through).

Volleyball.lesson_1: Forearm pass (bump) — wrists together, flat platform, angle toward target. Cue: straight and simple.
Volleyball.lesson_2: Overhead set — hands form triangle above forehead, push up like superman. Cue: make a window.
Volleyball.lesson_3: Underhand serve — bow and arrow stance. Place, step, hit. Cue: firm heel of open hand.

Tennis.lesson_1: Balloon and racket — tap and balance to develop touch. Then forehand with red ball on small court.
Tennis.lesson_2: Forehand + backhand rally. Key: use slower balls (red/orange). Cue: ready position between hits.
Tennis.lesson_3: Rallying games + underhand serve intro. Score from first lesson — modify rules to allow it.

Baseball / Softball.lesson_1: Hitting — stance, contact point, finish. Cue: freeze at finish to check balance.
Baseball / Softball.lesson_2: Catching (two hands, soft hands, give when you catch) + throwing (ready → throwing position → throw).
Baseball / Softball.lesson_3: Fielding ground balls (alligator hands, knees bent, head up) + baserunning circuit.

Judo fundamentals.lesson_1: Etiquette + ukemi (falling safely: back, side, front). Cue: protect your head first. Ne-waza games on the mat.
Judo fundamentals.lesson_2: Shrimping, crawling, rolling — ground movement games. Balance and grip awareness.
Judo fundamentals.lesson_3: Kuzushi (breaking balance) through movement games. No static lifting. Use momentum.

Athletics.lesson_1: Sprint mechanics (arm drive, knee lift) + standing broad jump.
Athletics.lesson_2: Running long jump (approach + takeoff) + throwing (beanbag or ball for distance).
Athletics.lesson_3: Combined mini-athletics circuit: sprint, jump, throw, relay.

Frisbee / Disc.lesson_1: Backhand throw grip and release. Catch with two hands. Short distance.
Frisbee / Disc.lesson_2: Backhand + forehand throw. Increase distance. Partner rally.
Frisbee / Disc.lesson_3: Disc games — Ultimate Frisbee rules simplified, or target throws.

judo_lesson_notes: Judo teaches ABCs naturally. Prioritize ukemi and ne-waza (ground work, 60-70% of time) before any standing throws. Never teach throws requiring static lifting — use momentum only. Etiquette and values (courage, respect, politeness) are part of every lesson.
progression_principles: Tumbling: 2–3 lessons per skill. Move on only when the readiness criteria are met. Faster learners get within-skill progressions.
Sport: rotate every 2–4 lessons following the lesson_1 → lesson_2 → lesson_3 sequence per sport.
Muscle focus: cycle Core → Upper → Lower → Full body across 4 consecutive lessons.
Relay/Game: vary the type each lesson (speed, memory, skill-transfer, team) to develop different capacities.
FMS monthly check: every 4 lessons should cover Locomotor + Object control + Stability.
Variable practice: mix skills within the lesson rather than blocking one skill for the whole session.
Intensity rhythm per lesson: low → medium → high → medium → high → low.

lessons.tumbling_focus: Shape only → first roll → clean stand
Clean stand-up (no hands) → run-up → two-in-a-row. Watch for: headstand roll (chin not tucked), inability to stand (momentum lost).
lessons.sport_focus: lesson_2: passing (plant foot next to ball, kick through center)

lessons.tumbling_focus: Rock-and-roll on back → backward roll from squat (hands ready and pushing). Prerequisite: forward roll is consistent.
lessons.sport_focus: lesson_1: bounce and catch, dribbling with dominant hand

lessons.tumbling_focus: Backward roll from standing. Two-in-a-row. Watch for: rolling onto neck (hands must push early).
Star jump awareness → cartwheel on tape line → one hand then other. Prerequisite: handstand shape understood.
lessons.sport_focus: lesson_1: forearm pass (bump) — wrists together, flat platform

lessons.tumbling_focus: Cartwheel with hurdle step. Round-off prep (snap-down landing). Watch for: both hands landing together.
lessons.sport_focus: lesson_2: overhead set — triangle hands, push up like superman

lessons.tumbling_focus: Hollow body hold → downward dog → wall handstand kick-up. Cue: squeeze ears with arms.
lessons.sport_focus: lesson_1: balloon touch, forehand with red/slow ball on short court

lessons.tumbling_focus: Walk feet up wall → chest-to-wall handstand → free handstand (partner spotted). Watch for: banana back.
lessons.sport_focus: lesson_2: forehand + backhand rally, ready position between hits

lessons.tumbling_focus: From lying: hands flat beside head, push up → hold → lower. Progress to bridge from standing (advanced).
lessons.sport_focus: lesson_1: hitting — stance, contact, finish (freeze to check balance)

lessons.tumbling_focus: Bridge hold + rock. Round-off: cartwheel with snap-down landing, feet together. Prerequisite: cartwheel is consistent.
lessons.sport_focus: lesson_1: etiquette + ukemi (back fall, side fall). Ne-waza games.

lessons.tumbling_focus: Round-off from run-up. Land with feet together, arms up. Watch for: feet not snapping together on landing.
lessons.sport_focus: lesson_2: shrimping, crawling, ground movement games. Balance and grip awareness.

lessons.tumbling_focus: Each child performs their best 2-skill combination (e.g. forward roll + cartwheel). Celebrate progress.
lessons.sport_focus: lesson_1: sprint mechanics + standing broad jump
